summary: Smoke-tested frontend after code quality fixes (XSS removal in CollectionsGrid, TranscriptModal key change, hook dependency comments). Homepage, Collections, Rajwada/Lal Bagh detail, Voices, and Transcript modal all render correctly. No React key warnings, no hook dependency warnings, no XSS issues introduced.
passed: Homepage loads with hero and collections
Collections page displays Rajwada and Lal Bagh cards
Rajwada detail page loads without errors
Lal Bagh detail page loads without errors
Voices page renders portraits and biography content
Transcript modal opens on 'Read Transcript' click
Transcript modal renders 15 paragraphs correctly - NO React key warnings observed
No XSS-related console errors after innerHTML removal
No missing-key or hook-dependency warnings in console

failed.area: Console (pre-existing, not caused by code quality fixes)
failed.issue: 'Failed to load archive data: TypeError: Failed to fetch' on initial load
failed.evidence: Console error on homepage/collections - backend API fetch failing but static data fallback works; UI still renders

failed.issue: DialogContent missing Description/aria-describedby warning on transcript modal
failed.evidence: Radix UI warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}'

action_items: No regressions from the code quality fixes. The XSS fix, key prop fix, and hook dependency comments did not introduce any new issues.
Optional: Investigate pre-existing 'Failed to load archive data' fetch error (not related to current changes).
Optional: Add DialogDescription/aria-describedby to TranscriptModal DialogContent for accessibility.
notes: Audio playback not tested (known Playwright AAC codec limitation). Image count on detail pages showed 3 via locator('img') but likely due to lazy loading - screenshots confirmed page rendered without errors. Key regression checks (React keys, hook deps, XSS) all clean.
